subject: Stat Theory
question: A Type I error occurs when:

options.A: We fail to reject H_0 when H_1 is true
options.B: We reject H_0 when H_0 is true
options.D: The test statistic equals the critical value

explanation: Type I error = false positive = rejecting H_0 when it is true. Probability = α. Type II error (option A) has probability β.
